title: Copper Expansion
description: This is my Debut mod, it Adds a Little stuff like Copper Tools and Armor and a new Weapon called the ThunderBlade!
body:
Embark on an enriched early-game journey and late game combat in Minecraft with the Copper Expansion mod! This mod introduces essential new features centered around copper, enhancing your gameplay with practical improvements and exciting new items.

**Features:**
- **Copper Tools and Armor:** Equip yourself with essential copper tools and armor, ideal for early-game survival and exploration.
- **The ThunderBlade:** Unleash the power of storms with the ThunderBlade! This unique weapon summons lightning to strike enemies during thunderstorms, adding a thrilling combat dynamic.
- **Enhanced Early-Game Utility:** Improve your gameplay experience with accessible copper gear that balances effectiveness and ease of use.

**Why Choose Copper Expansion?**
- **Early-Game Advantages:** Equip yourself with reliable copper gear to streamline your early-game progression and survival.
- **Unique Gameplay Mechanics:** Master the ThunderBlade's ability to harness natural lightning, turning the tide of battle in your favor.

Discover the potential of copper and transform your early-game and late combat experience in Minecraft with the Copper Expansion mod today!
